component.name: Harvest tracker
component.summary: Track garden harvests, watering, and charts locally

description.p: Harvest tracker is a local app for recording garden harvests by season. It helps log harvested weights, item counts, individual item weights, watering, and estimated value, then view the results as interactive charts.
Harvest data stays on your computer. Each season can be imported or exported as a file, with no account or cloud service required.
Harvest tracker is released under the MIT License.
